name: Venison Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the venison into strips approximately 1/4 x 1 x 8-inches.
2. Mix all ingredients and marinate the venison for about 10 hours, turning once every hour.
3. Smoke the venison on a grill until it is completely dry, or use an oven set to low heat with the venison spread out on a broiler pan.
